meta.title: Project | kalandra.tech — Live-Built Showcase
meta.description: Live-built showcase documenting the architecture, roadmap, and technical decisions behind kalandra.tech — from static site to full-stack SaaS.

hero.description: This page is an evolving experiment in digital architecture. It serves as a live-built showcase of my skills where every iteration is documented, from initial wireframes to advanced features.

roadmap.title: Development Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: 5 versions from static site to advanced backend features. Each version adds a layer of complexity.

versions.title: Simple Site
versions.description: Simple site with domain, hosting and deployment pipeline.

details.author: pavel
details.text: Set up domain, DNS and Cloudflare Pages hosting

details.author: claude
details.text: Designed pages in Google Stitch, built with Astro + Tailwind

details.author: claude
details.text: Light and dark theme with system preference detection

details.author: claude
details.text: Language picker (English / Czech) with per-page translations

versions.title: Backend Included
versions.nextTime: Could do it in ~10 hours next time.
versions.timeNote: Time tracked covers the initial rollout only. Improvements and iteration add significantly more.
versions.description: ASP.NET Core backend with Supabase Auth and Marten event sourcing. Used for managing job offers — users can submit and track offers, admins can review and update statuses.

details.author: pavel
details.text: Supabase project and Google OAuth setup

details.author: pavel
details.text: Oracle Cloud VM, PostgreSQL, Caddy reverse proxy

details.author: claude
details.text: ASP.NET Core Web API with vertical slices and Marten event sourcing

details.author: claude
details.text: Job offer form, user dashboard and admin view with i18n

details.author: claude
details.text: Docker setup, CI/CD pipeline to Oracle Cloud

details.author: claude
details.text: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA on job offer submission

versions.title: Emails, Slack & Observability
versions.description: Email confirmations and Slack notifications on job offer submissions and status changes. Full observability stack: Sentry for error tracking, PostHog for product analytics, BetterStack for logging and uptime.

versions.title: Background Tasks
versions.description: Move emails and notifications into background processing. Self-hosted Temporal on the backend VPS with retry semantics. Fallback: Azure Queue Storage.

versions.title: Pay to Win (Stripe)
versions.description: Monetize job offer submissions via Stripe with tiered pricing.

cta.title: Witness the progress.
cta.description: This is a public engineering journal. Follow the repository to see the commits that built this exact page.
